entry.title: Aikido
entry.description: Aikido provides automated security scanning and vulnerability management for code repositories and cloud infrastructure.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes unlimited open source repositories and 1 private repository with automated security scanning.
caveats: Private repo scanning limited to one repository

useCases: Automated vulnerability scanning for open source projects
Continuous security checks for small private repositories
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Aikido account at https://www.aikido.dev.
Connect your GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket account.
Select repositories to scan (unlimited open source, one private).
Review automated security scan results in the dashboard.
Set up notifications or integrations as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Aikido to automate security scanning for open source or a single private repository with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need scanning for multiple private repositories or advanced enterprise security features.
entry.body: Aikido offers automated security scanning for code repositories, making it easy to identify vulnerabilities in open source and small private projects.

entry.title: Aiven
entry.description: Aiven provides managed open source data infrastructure services on major clouds with automated operations and scaling.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free 30-day trial with $300 credits for any managed service.
billingRiskNotes: No charges unless you upgrade after trial

quickstartSteps: Sign up at aiven.io and verify your email.
Add a payment method to activate the free trial.
Create a new service (e.g., PostgreSQL, Kafka) from the dashboard.
Configure service settings and choose a cloud provider/region.
Connect your application using the provided connection details.
entry.whenToUse: Use Aiven to quickly deploy and test managed open source databases or streaming services without infrastructure management.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need a permanent free tier or wish to self-host for full control and cost savings.
avoidIf: Long-term production on a free plan
entry.body: Aiven offers a 30-day free trial with $300 credits to try managed open source data services like PostgreSQL, Kafka, and Redis on your choice of cloud provider. The trial requires a credit card and is ideal for prototyping, evaluation, or short-term testing, but there is no always-free tier for ongoing use.

entry.title: Arize AI
entry.description: Arize AI provides observability and monitoring for machine learning models in production environments.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes model monitoring for up to 10,000 predictions per month.
caveats: No advanced analytics or enterprise integrations

useCases: Monitor ML model performance in production
quickstartSteps: Sign up for an Arize AI account.
Create a new organization and project.
Integrate the Arize SDK into your ML pipeline.
Log model predictions and actuals to Arize.
View dashboards for drift and performance metrics.
entry.whenToUse: Use Arize AI when you need to monitor deployed ML models for drift, performance, or data quality issues.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require monitoring for more than 10,000 predictions/month or need advanced analytics without upgrading.
avoidIf: You need custom integrations or enterprise support
entry.body: Arize AI offers a free tier for ML model observability, enabling teams to monitor up to 10,000 predictions per month with basic drift and performance analytics. It's ideal for small-scale production deployments or pilots, but larger workloads or advanced features require a paid plan.

entry.title: Azure AI Bot Service
entry.description: Azure AI Bot Service enables building, testing, deploying, and managing intelligent bots across multiple channels.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 10,000 premium messages per month.
caveats: Premium channels and advanced analytics require paid tiers

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure portal and create a new Bot Service resource.
Configure your bot using the Azure Bot Framework Composer or SDK.
Connect your bot to desired channels (e.g., Teams, Web Chat, Facebook).
Test your bot using the integrated web chat or Bot Framework Emulator.
Deploy and monitor your bot from the Azure portal.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to quickly build and deploy conversational bots integrated with Azure and popular messaging platforms.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require fully open-source hosting, advanced analytics, or need to avoid Azure cloud dependencies.
entry.body: Azure AI Bot Service provides a managed platform for building, deploying, and scaling intelligent bots with integration to Azure and popular messaging channels. The free tier is suitable for prototyping and small-scale production use, with a generous monthly message allowance and easy integration with other Azure services. Advanced features and premium channels require upgrading to paid tiers.

entry.title: Azure AI Content Safety
entry.description: Detects and filters harmful, offensive, or inappropriate content in text and images using AI models.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 10,000 text records and 1,000 image records per month.
billingRiskNotes: Usage beyond free tier is automatically billed.

useCases: Filter offensive language in chat apps
quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure portal and create an AI Content Safety resource.
Obtain your API key and endpoint from the resource overview.
Install the Azure AI Content Safety SDK or use the REST API.
Send sample text or image data to the API for moderation.
Review moderation results and integrate into your application workflow.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to automatically detect and filter harmful or inappropriate content in user-generated text or images.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require moderation for video, audio, or need an on-premises solution; not ideal for extremely high-volume, cost-sensitive use cases.
entry.body: Azure AI Content Safety provides AI-powered moderation for text and images, helping developers automatically detect and filter harmful or inappropriate content at scale.

entry.title: Azure AI Custom Vision
entry.description: Train, deploy, and improve custom image classification and object detection models with minimal code using Azure's managed service.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes limited training hours and prediction transactions per month.

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal and create a Custom Vision resource.
Upload and label your training images in the Custom Vision portal.
Train your model using the provided interface.
Test your model with new images to evaluate performance.
Export or deploy the model as needed for your application.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to quickly build and deploy custom image classification or object detection models without deep ML expertise.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require large-scale training, advanced customization, or on-premises deployment beyond the free tier limits.
entry.body: Azure AI Custom Vision enables users to train and deploy custom image classification and object detection models with minimal setup, ideal for rapid prototyping and small-scale applications.

entry.title: Azure AI Document Intelligence
entry.description: Extracts structured data from documents using AI-powered OCR and form recognition.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 500 pages per month for key features.
limits: 500 pages/month for Read, Layout, General Document, Prebuilt Invoice, Receipt, Business Card, Identity Document, and Tax W-2 APIs
caveats: Other features may not be included in free tier
billingRiskNotes: Charges apply if you exceed free page limits

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal.
Create an AI Document Intelligence resource.
Obtain your endpoint and API key from the resource.
Install the Azure AI Document Intelligence SDK or use REST API.
Send a document to the API and retrieve extracted data.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to extract structured data from documents like invoices, receipts, or forms at scale.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need on-premises processing or have strict data residency requirements, as processing occurs in Azure's cloud.
avoidIf: handling highly sensitive documents with strict compliance needs
entry.body: Azure AI Document Intelligence provides AI-powered OCR and form recognition to extract structured data from documents, supporting automated workflows and digitization. The free tier offers 500 pages per month for key APIs, making it suitable for small to medium workloads. Overages are billed per page, and processing is cloud-based, so consider compliance and data residency requirements.

entry.title: Azure AI Face
entry.description: Azure AI Face provides facial detection, recognition, and analysis APIs for building secure and intelligent applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 30,000 Face API transactions per month.
caveats: Some advanced features may require paid tier
billingRiskNotes: Usage above free tier incurs charges automatically

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal and create a Face resource.
Obtain your Face API endpoint and key from the Azure Portal.
Install the Azure Face SDK or use the REST API.
Authenticate using your API key.
Send an image to the Face API for detection or analysis.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need reliable facial detection or recognition in cloud-based apps with generous free monthly usage.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require on-premises processing, strict data residency, or need unlimited free usage.
entry.body: Azure AI Face offers scalable facial detection and recognition APIs with a generous free tier, suitable for authentication, analysis, and security use cases.

entry.title: Azure AI Health Bot
entry.description: Azure AI Health Bot enables healthcare organizations to build compliant, conversational AI experiences for patients and providers.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 3,000 messages per month for Health Bot usage.
billingRiskNotes: Charges apply if message limit exceeded

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal.
Search for 'Health Bot' and create a new Health Bot resource.
Configure your bot's language, compliance, and branding settings.
Integrate with healthcare data sources or APIs as needed.
Deploy the bot and test using the built-in web chat interface.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need a compliant, healthcare-focused conversational AI for patient or provider engagement with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require non-healthcare bots, advanced custom NLP, or need to exceed 3,000 free messages monthly without incurring costs.
entry.body: Azure AI Health Bot provides a compliant, healthcare-specific conversational AI platform with a free tier for low-volume use, suitable for patient engagement and triage automation.

entry.title: Azure AI Immersive Reader
entry.description: Azure AI Immersive Reader provides text-to-speech, translation, and reading comprehension tools for web and app content accessibility.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 3,000 transactions per month.
billingRiskNotes: Usage beyond free tier is automatically billed

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal and create an Immersive Reader resource.
Obtain your resource key and endpoint from the Azure Portal.
Install the Immersive Reader SDK in your application.
Configure authentication using your resource key and endpoint.
Integrate Immersive Reader features into your app or website.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to add reading accessibility, text-to-speech, or translation features to web or app content with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited free usage, offline processing, or need to support platforms not compatible with Azure services.
entry.body: Azure AI Immersive Reader enables developers to quickly add reading, translation, and accessibility features to applications, supporting diverse user needs and compliance.

entry.title: Azure AI Language
entry.description: Azure AI Language provides natural language processing APIs for text analysis, translation, entity recognition, and conversational AI.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes limited monthly transactions for key language APIs.
caveats: Some advanced features may not be included in free tier.
Overages are billed at standard rates.
billingRiskNotes: Usage beyond free limits incurs charges.

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal and create an AI Language resource.
Obtain your API key and endpoint from the resource overview.
Install the Azure AI Language SDK or use REST API.
Authenticate using your API key in your application.
Call the desired language API (e.g., sentiment analysis, translation).
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need scalable, managed NLP APIs for text analysis, translation, or conversational AI without building models from scratch.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require full model customization, on-premises deployment, or need unlimited free usage for high-volume workloads.
entry.body: Azure AI Language offers managed APIs for text analytics, translation, and conversational AI, with a generous free tier suitable for prototyping and moderate production workloads.

entry.title: Azure AI Personalizer
entry.description: Azure AI Personalizer delivers real-time, adaptive content and experience personalization using reinforcement learning.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 50,000 transactions per month.
caveats: No enterprise support on free tier
billingRiskNotes: Usage above free tier incurs charges automatically

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure portal and create a Personalizer resource.
Obtain your resource endpoint and API key from the Azure portal.
Install the Azure Personalizer SDK or use the REST API.
Configure your application to send rank and reward events.
Monitor usage and adjust parameters as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to personalize content or experiences in real time with minimal machine learning expertise.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require offline batch recommendations, on-premises deployment, or strict hard caps on usage.
entry.body: Azure AI Personalizer provides real-time, adaptive personalization using reinforcement learning, suitable for dynamic content and recommendation scenarios with a generous free tier.

entry.title: Azure AI Search
entry.description: Azure AI Search is a cloud search service for building rich search experiences over private, heterogeneous content.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes one search service with up to 3 indexes and 50 MB storage.

useCases: Prototype search for web or mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure portal.
Create a new Azure AI Search service using the Free tier.
Define and import your data source (e.g., Azure Blob Storage, SQL Database).
Create an index and configure fields.
Upload or connect your data and test search queries.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to prototype or test search features in Azure without incurring costs.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid for production workloads or large-scale search needs due to strict resource and SLA limitations.
entry.body: Azure AI Search provides a managed search-as-a-service platform with AI enrichment, ideal for prototyping and learning but not suitable for production-scale workloads on the free tier.

entry.title: Azure AI Speech
entry.description: Azure AI Speech provides cloud-based speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and speech translation APIs for applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes limited monthly usage for speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and translation.
caveats: No custom voice or batch transcription in free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal and create a Speech resource.
Copy your Speech resource key and endpoint.
Install the Azure Speech SDK for your preferred language.
Configure your app with the key and endpoint.
Call the API for speech-to-text, text-to-speech, or translation.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need reliable cloud-based speech recognition, synthesis, or translation with generous free monthly limits.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need unlimited usage, custom voice models, or fully offline/local processing.
entry.body: Azure AI Speech offers cloud APIs for speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and translation, with a free tier suitable for development and light production workloads.

entry.title: Azure AI Translator
entry.description: Cloud-based machine translation service supporting multiple languages for real-time and batch text translation.

freeTierDetails.summary: 2 million characters per month free for standard translation.
limits: No free quota for custom translation
caveats: Custom translation and advanced features not included in free tier
billingRiskNotes: Usage above free tier incurs charges

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal and create an AI Translator resource.
Obtain your API key and endpoint from the resource overview.
Install the Azure Translator SDK or use REST API in your application.
Configure your app with the API key and endpoint.
Send text to the API for translation and handle the response.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need scalable, automated text translation for apps, websites, or workflows with moderate monthly usage.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need custom translation models, offline translation, or expect to exceed the free tier regularly.
entry.body: Azure AI Translator provides scalable, cloud-based machine translation with a generous free tier for standard translation, ideal for apps and websites needing multilingual support.

entry.title: Azure AI Vision
entry.description: Azure AI Vision provides cloud-based image and video analysis APIs for extracting information and insights from visual content.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes limited monthly transactions for core vision APIs.
caveats: Some advanced features may not be included in free tier

useCases: Detecting objects and faces in photos
quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure portal and create an AI Vision resource.
Retrieve your API key and endpoint from the resource overview.
Install the Azure AI Vision SDK or use REST API in your application.
Authenticate using your API key and endpoint.
Send an image or video to the API and process the response.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need scalable, cloud-based image or video analysis without building custom ML models.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require on-premises processing, real-time edge inference, or need unlimited free usage.
entry.body: Azure AI Vision offers cloud APIs for extracting information from images and videos, including OCR, object detection, and face recognition, with a generous free tier for development and prototyping.

entry.title: Brainboard
entry.description: Visual cloud infrastructure design and deployment tool supporting multiple cloud providers with collaborative features.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 1 user, unlimited diagrams, and limited deployments.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Brainboard account.
Create a new project and select your cloud provider.
Drag and drop resources to design your infrastructure diagram.
Configure resource properties and relationships.
Export or deploy the generated Terraform code.
entry.whenToUse: Use Brainboard when you need to visually design and deploy cloud infrastructure, especially for prototyping or small projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced team collaboration, complex workflows, or integration with enterprise CI/CD pipelines.
entry.body: Brainboard offers a visual approach to designing and deploying cloud infrastructure, making it easy to create diagrams and generate Terraform code for rapid prototyping or small-scale deployments.

entry.title: Braintrust
entry.description: Braintrust offers managed open-source LLM evaluation and monitoring for AI applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 1,000 evaluations per month with core monitoring features.
caveats: Usage above free limit requires upgrade

useCases: Automate regression testing for AI apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Braintrust account.
Connect your LLM application using the provided SDK or API.
Configure evaluation criteria and monitoring settings.
Send LLM outputs for evaluation via API.
Review evaluation results and monitor performance in the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Braintrust to evaluate and monitor LLM outputs in development or production for quality assurance and benchmarking.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need evaluation for non-LLM models or require unlimited usage without cost.
avoidIf: You require unlimited evaluations for free
entry.body: Braintrust provides managed open-source tools for evaluating and monitoring large language model outputs, helping teams ensure AI quality and reliability.

entry.title: Browse AI
entry.description: Browse AI lets you automate web data extraction and monitoring with no-code robots.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes 50 credits per month and 5 robots.
caveats: Some advanced features require paid plans
Credit usage varies by task complexity

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Browse AI account.
Create a new robot and specify the target website.
Train the robot by recording your actions or using templates.
Test the robot and adjust extraction fields as needed.
Schedule runs or trigger the robot manually to collect data.
entry.whenToUse: Use Browse AI when you need to automate web data extraction or monitor website changes without coding.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require large-scale scraping, advanced customization, or need to bypass strict anti-bot protections.
avoidIf: target sites with strong anti-bot measures
entry.body: Browse AI offers a no-code platform for automating web data extraction and monitoring, ideal for small-scale, non-technical users.

entry.title: Clair
entry.description: Clair is an AI-powered assistant that helps teams query and analyze data from various sources using natural language.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows limited queries and integrations for individuals or small teams.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Clair account.
Connect your preferred data source (e.g., Google Sheets, database).
Set up access permissions for your team.
Start asking questions in natural language to analyze your data.
entry.whenToUse: Use Clair when you need a simple way for your team to query and analyze data without SQL or coding.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Clair if you require complex data modeling, high-volume queries, or advanced analytics features.
entry.body: Clair is an AI assistant that enables teams to interact with and analyze data using natural language, making data access easier for non-technical users.

entry.title: Comet ML
entry.description: Comet ML provides experiment tracking, model management, and collaboration tools for machine learning projects.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan for individuals and small teams with core experiment tracking features.

useCases: Share results with teams or open source
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Comet ML account.
Install the Comet Python SDK using pip.
Add Comet experiment tracking code to your ML scripts.
Run your experiments and view results in the Comet dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Comet ML to track, compare, and share machine learning experiments or models, especially for solo or small team projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced team features, unlimited private projects, or strict on-premise data controls.
entry.body: Comet ML offers a free plan for individuals and small teams to track machine learning experiments, manage models, and collaborate on projects.

entry.title: CrewAI
entry.description: CrewAI lets you build AI agent teams that collaborate to automate complex workflows and tasks.

freeTierDetails.summary: Open-source framework with no usage limits for self-hosted deployments.
limits: No enforced limits for self-hosted use
Cloud version may have usage restrictions
caveats: Cloud-hosted version may introduce quotas or paid features

quickstartSteps: Install Python and required dependencies.
Clone the CrewAI repository from GitHub.
Install CrewAI using pip.
Configure your agents and tasks in a Python script.
Run your script to launch the agent crew.
entry.whenToUse: Use CrewAI when you need to coordinate multiple AI agents for complex, multi-step automation or research tasks.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid CrewAI if you need a managed, production-ready SaaS platform or require strict enterprise support.
entry.body: CrewAI is an open-source framework for building collaborative AI agent teams to automate and orchestrate complex workflows. It is ideal for prototyping, research, and open-source projects, but may not suit users needing managed, production-grade solutions.

entry.title: Dataimporter.io
entry.description: Dataimporter.io enables easy import and transformation of CSV and Excel data into databases and SaaS platforms.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows limited imports and transformations per month.
caveats: No scheduling or automation in free tier
Limited support for advanced data sources

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Dataimporter.io account.
Connect your target database or SaaS platform.
Upload your CSV or Excel file.
Map columns and configure basic transformations.
Run the import and verify results.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to quickly import small datasets from CSV or Excel into a database or SaaS without complex setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require automated, large-scale, or highly customized ETL workflows, or need to process files exceeding free tier limits.
entry.body: Dataimporter.io provides a simple interface for importing and transforming CSV or Excel data into databases and SaaS platforms, making it ideal for quick, small-scale data migrations and prototyping.

entry.title: Flair
entry.description: Flair offers AI-powered image generation and editing tools for marketing and creative teams.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes limited monthly image generations and basic editing features.

quickstartSteps: Visit flair.ai and sign up for a free account.
Verify your email address to activate your account.
Log in and start a new project from the dashboard.
Upload your product image or select a template.
Use the AI tools to generate or edit images as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Flair when you need quick, AI-generated images or mockups for marketing, social media, or creative projects without design expertise.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Flair if you require high-volume image generation, advanced editing, or commercial usage rights without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: Flair provides a user-friendly platform for generating and editing images with AI, ideal for quick marketing visuals and creative experimentation on a limited free plan.

entry.title: Groq
entry.description: Groq provides ultra-fast inference APIs for large language models with a focus on low latency and high throughput.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier offers limited monthly usage of LLM inference APIs.
caveats: Limited model selection on free tier
No SLA or guaranteed uptime for free users

useCases: Integrating fast LLM inference into apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Groq account at https://groq.com/.
Navigate to the API dashboard and generate an API key.
Review available LLM endpoints and their documentation.
Send a test request using your API key and preferred endpoint.
Monitor usage in the dashboard to stay within free tier limits.
entry.whenToUse: Use Groq when you need fast, low-latency LLM inference for prototypes, demos, or early-stage product development.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require access to a wide variety of models, higher token limits, or enterprise-grade SLAs on the free tier.
entry.body: Groq offers a fast, developer-friendly API for LLM inference with a generous free tier suitable for experimentation and prototyping.

entry.title: Hugging Face Hub
entry.description: A platform for hosting, sharing, and discovering machine learning models, datasets, and related resources.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes unlimited public repositories and limited private repositories for models and datasets.
caveats: Private repo and storage limits apply

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Hugging Face account.
Create a new repository for your model or dataset.
Upload your files using the web UI or CLI.
Set repository visibility (public or private).
Share your repository link or integrate with your ML workflow.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to host, share, or collaborate on machine learning models or datasets with a community or team.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require large-scale private storage, advanced access controls, or strict enterprise compliance out of the box.
entry.body: Hugging Face Hub provides a collaborative platform for sharing machine learning models and datasets, supporting open-source and research communities with generous free public hosting.

entry.title: Hugging Face Spaces
entry.description: Host and share machine learning demos and apps with free web hosting for ML models and interactive UIs.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows unlimited public Spaces with basic CPU resources and limited concurrent sessions.
limits: No GPU access on free tier
caveats: Private Spaces and GPU require paid plans
Idle Spaces may sleep or be stopped

Navigate to the Spaces section and click 'Create new Space'.
Choose a template (Gradio, Streamlit, or custom).
Push your app code via Git or the web editor.
Deploy and share your Space URL.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you want to quickly deploy and share ML demos or interactive apps without managing infrastructure.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need private hosting, GPU compute, or advanced scaling for production workloads.
entry.body: Hugging Face Spaces provides free, easy-to-use hosting for machine learning demos and interactive web apps using Gradio or Streamlit, ideal for sharing prototypes and open source projects.

entry.title: InstallOnAir
entry.description: InstallOnAir provides a simple platform to distribute iOS and Android app builds for testing and internal use.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows limited app uploads and downloads for testing purposes.

Internal app deployment for small teams
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free InstallOnAir account.
Upload your iOS (.ipa) or Android (.apk) app build.
Copy the generated public download link.
Share the link with testers or team members.

entry.title: IntoDNS.ai
entry.description: IntoDNS.ai provides automated DNS health checks and reports for domains, highlighting configuration issues and best practices.

Review the results and follow recommendations.

entry.title: Langfuse

Integrate the Langfuse SDK into your LLM application.
Send traces and events from your app to Langfuse.

entry.title: LangWatch

Create a new project in the dashboard.
Integrate the LangWatch SDK into your LLM application.
Configure prompt tracking and send requests.
View analytics and logs in the LangWatch dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use LangWatch when you need to monitor, debug, or analyze prompt usage in LLM-powered applications.

entry.title: Localhero.ai
entry.description: Localhero.ai provides free, privacy-focused geolocation APIs for IP address lookup and location enrichment.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 1,000 requests per day with no credit card required.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Localhero.ai account.
Obtain your API key from the dashboard.
Read the API documentation for endpoint details.
Send a GET request to the geolocation endpoint with your API key.
Integrate the response into your application.

entry.title: Lumenfall.ai
entry.description: Lumenfall.ai provides free, privacy-focused AI chatbots and assistants for personal and professional use.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free access to AI chatbots with no account or payment required.

quickstartSteps: Go to https://lumenfall.ai/
Choose a chatbot or assistant from the homepage.
Start chatting—no signup or login required.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need instant, privacy-friendly AI chat without creating an account or sharing personal data.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require API access, custom model training, or enterprise integrations.
entry.body: Lumenfall.ai offers free, privacy-first AI chatbots for instant conversations without registration, ideal for users seeking simple, secure AI assistance.

entry.title: Maxim AI
entry.description: Maxim AI provides a collaborative platform for prompt engineering, testing, and evaluation of generative AI models.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier offers limited prompt runs and basic collaboration features.
limits: Up to 100 prompt runs per month
caveats: Advanced features and higher usage require paid plans

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Maxim AI account.
Create a new project and select a supported LLM integration.
Write and test your first prompt in the editor.
Invite collaborators to review or edit prompts.
Analyze model outputs and iterate as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Maxim AI when you need to collaboratively design, test, and evaluate prompts for generative AI models.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require high-volume prompt runs, advanced analytics, or private model hosting beyond the free tier limits.
entry.body: Maxim AI is a collaborative platform for prompt engineering and LLM evaluation, offering a free tier suitable for experimentation and small team workflows.

entry.title: MediaWorkbench.ai
entry.description: MediaWorkbench.ai provides AI-powered tools for video and audio editing, transcription, and content generation in the cloud.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes limited monthly usage of core AI editing and transcription features.
limits: Up to 60 minutes of video/audio processing per month
caveats: No access to premium AI models

useCases: Quick video edits for social media
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free MediaWorkbench.ai account.
Upload your video or audio file to the dashboard.
Select the desired AI tool (e.g., transcription, editing).
Configure options and run the process.
Download or share the processed media.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need fast, AI-assisted editing or transcription for short media files without installing software.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require high-volume processing, advanced editing features, or watermark-free exports on the free tier.
entry.body: MediaWorkbench.ai offers a browser-based suite of AI tools for editing, transcribing, and generating media, ideal for quick, small-scale projects.

entry.title: Othor AI
entry.description: Othor AI provides free AI-powered document search and Q&A for PDFs and websites with a generous always-free tier.

freeTierDetails.summary: Always-free tier with up to 1,000 pages and 3 sources per workspace.
caveats: No API access on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Othor AI account at https://othor.ai/.
Create a new workspace from your dashboard.
Upload PDF files or add website URLs as sources.
Wait for indexing to complete.
Start asking questions or searching your documents.
entry.whenToUse: Use Othor AI when you need fast, AI-powered search and Q&A over PDFs or websites without setup or coding.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need API access, private source indexing, or advanced customization beyond the free tier limits.
entry.body: Othor AI offers a generous always-free tier for AI-powered document and website search, ideal for students, indie projects, and open source documentation.

entry.title: Pollinations.AI
entry.description: Pollinations.AI provides AI-powered image generation and creative tools for artists, developers, and content creators.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows limited AI image generation with basic features.

quickstartSteps: Visit the Pollinations.AI website.
Sign up for a free account using your email.
Navigate to the image generation tool.
Enter a text prompt and submit to generate an image.
Download or share your generated image.
entry.whenToUse: Use Pollinations.AI when you need quick, AI-generated images for creative projects, prototyping, or inspiration without setup overhead.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require high-resolution, unwatermarked images, commercial rights, or advanced customization beyond the free tier limits.
entry.body: Pollinations.AI offers a simple platform for generating AI-powered images from text prompts, ideal for creative exploration and prototyping with a generous free tier.

entry.title: Raindrop.io
entry.description: Raindrop.io is a cloud-based bookmark manager for organizing, syncing, and sharing web links across devices.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes unlimited bookmarks, collections, and device sync with basic features.
limits: No full-text search or advanced features
caveats: No nested collections or advanced filters
No permanent library or duplicate finder
Limited to basic sharing and collaboration

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Raindrop.io account at https://raindrop.io.
Install the browser extension or mobile app for your device.
Start saving bookmarks using the extension, app, or web interface.
Organize bookmarks into collections and add tags as needed.
Share collections or bookmarks with others if desired.
entry.whenToUse: Use Raindrop.io to organize and sync bookmarks across devices, especially for research, reading lists, or collaborative link sharing.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced features like nested collections, full-text search, or permanent library, which require a paid plan.
entry.body: Raindrop.io provides a free, user-friendly way to organize and sync bookmarks, making it suitable for individuals and small teams needing basic link management.

entry.title: SSH.ai
entry.description: SSH.ai provides passwordless SSH authentication using passkeys and biometrics for secure, seamless server access.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows passwordless SSH login for up to 3 users and 5 servers.
caveats: Limited to non-commercial or evaluation use

useCases: Secure SSH access for small teams
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free SSH.ai account.
Register your SSH public key and enable passkey or biometric authentication.
Add your servers to the SSH.ai dashboard.
Install the SSH.ai agent on your servers.
Connect to your server using SSH with SSH.ai authentication.
entry.whenToUse: Use SSH.ai to enable passwordless, biometric SSH authentication for small teams or personal projects without managing SSH keys manually.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need to support more than 3 users or 5 servers for free, or require advanced enterprise features.
entry.body: SSH.ai offers a free tier for passwordless SSH authentication using passkeys and biometrics, ideal for small teams or personal projects seeking secure, easy server access.

entry.title: Syagent.com
entry.description: Syagent.com offers free static website hosting with custom domain support and SSL certificates.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free static site hosting with SSL and custom domain support.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Syagent.com account.
Create a new static site project from the dashboard.
Upload your static website files (HTML, CSS, JS).
Connect your custom domain and configure DNS as instructed.
Enable SSL certificate from the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Syagent.com when you need to host a simple static website with a custom domain and SSL for free.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require backend processing, databases, or need to host large files or high-traffic sites.
entry.body: Syagent.com provides a free, beginner-friendly platform for hosting static websites with custom domains and SSL, ideal for small projects and personal sites.

entry.title: Tavily AI
entry.description: Tavily AI provides an API for real-time web search and retrieval to enhance AI and LLM applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 100 API searches per month.
caveats: No guaranteed SLA on free tier

useCases: Enhancing LLMs with real-time web data
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Tavily AI account at https://tavily.com/.
Verify your email and log in to the dashboard.
Navigate to the API section and generate your API key.
Review API documentation for endpoint usage and parameters.
Make your first API call using your key to test search functionality.
entry.whenToUse: Use Tavily AI when you need to augment AI or chatbot applications with fresh, real-time web search results.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require high-volume search, guaranteed uptime, or advanced features beyond the free tier limits.
entry.body: Tavily AI offers a simple API for real-time web search, ideal for augmenting LLMs and chatbots with current information in prototypes and side projects.

entry.title: Upstash Vector
entry.description: Upstash Vector provides a managed vector database with a free tier for building AI-powered search and retrieval applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 100,000 vectors and 1 GB storage per database.
caveats: Performance and features may be limited on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Upstash account.
Create a new Vector database from the Upstash dashboard.
Copy your database endpoint and credentials.
Integrate with your application using the Upstash Vector SDK or REST API.
Start inserting and querying vectors.
entry.whenToUse: Use Upstash Vector when you need a simple, managed vector database for small to medium AI search or retrieval projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need high-throughput, advanced features, or strict SLAs for production-critical workloads.
entry.body: Upstash Vector offers a managed, serverless vector database with a generous free tier, ideal for building and testing AI-powered search and retrieval features.

entry.title: Waitlio
entry.description: Waitlio provides embeddable waitlists and referral programs for product launches and early access campaigns.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows basic waitlist and referral functionality for small projects.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Waitlio account.
Create a new waitlist project and configure basic settings.
Customize the signup form and referral options.
Embed the widget on your website or share the link.
Monitor signups and referrals from the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Waitlio to quickly set up a waitlist or referral program for new product launches or beta signups.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced customization, custom domains, or expect more than 250 signups per project.
entry.body: Waitlio offers a simple way to add waitlists and referral programs to your product launch, with a generous free tier for small projects.

entry.title: WaiverStevie.com
entry.description: WaiverStevie.com provides free digital waiver signing and management for small businesses and events.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes unlimited waivers for up to 5 events per month.

useCases: Collecting digital waivers for small events
Streamlining waiver workflows for small businesses
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free WaiverStevie.com account.
Create your first event and customize your waiver template.
Share the waiver link with participants.
Monitor signed waivers in your dashboard.
Download or export signed waivers as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need a simple, free solution to collect and manage digital waivers for a limited number of events.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited events, advanced integrations, or custom branding beyond the free plan's limits.
entry.body: WaiverStevie.com offers a free tier for digital waiver management, ideal for small businesses or events needing basic e-signature workflows without advanced features.

entry.title: Wolfram Language
entry.description: A symbolic programming language for computation, data analysis, visualization, and algorithm development.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free Wolfram Cloud accounts allow limited usage of Wolfram Language in the cloud.

quickstartSteps: Go to the Wolfram Cloud website and sign up for a free account.
Log in and create a new notebook in the Wolfram Cloud interface.
Enter and run Wolfram Language code in the notebook.
Save or share your notebook as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need symbolic computation, data analysis, or interactive notebooks without installing software.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need heavy computation, offline use, or integration with non-Wolfram systems.
entry.body: Wolfram Language offers a powerful symbolic programming environment for computation, visualization, and algorithm development, accessible via free cloud notebooks with usage limits.
